meta.method_decode: decode tok/s over 128 generated tokens, same session; llama.cpp = llama-bench tg128 (-r 3); SAPIENT = bench-llm streamed generation (mean of 3 warm runs); Ollama = /api/generate eval_count/eval_duration (mean of 3). Ollama llama-1B uses its default tag (Q8_0).
meta.method_ttft: warm-model time to first streamed token; SAPIENT = bench-llm warm-run mean; Ollama = (total_duration - eval_duration) proxy, warm-run mean; llama.cpp omitted (llama-bench reports no TTFT)
